rationale: Engine robustness: fenced-block proposal parsing, CRLF/recount-tolerant apply, and a SAFE quality gate that reverts changes dropping a module docstring or breaking parse.
expected_effect: Real model-generated diffs apply reliably; silently-degrading SAFE changes are auto-reverted.
rollback_plan: git revert the merge commit of PR #4.
approval_channel: explicit human approval (AskUserQuestion), recorded by agent
diff_note: Full diff omitted from record (contains detector-pattern literals); bound to the change via diff_hash. See PR #4 commit history.
